case_title: JULIANA YEE ET AL VS. THINK TANK LEARING, INC.

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, JULIANA AS TO DEFENDANT THINK TANK LEARNING, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED DEC-28-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THINK TANK LEARNING, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-20-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JULIANA YEE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DANIEL YEE. DEFENDANT THINK TANK LEARNING DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEE, JULIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THINK TANK LEARNING, INC. $3,761.76 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,861.76 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,761.76 FILED BY YEE, JULIANA YEE, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT THINK TANK LEARNING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2019 - JUDGMENT. FEB-20-2019 JUDGMENT CORRECTED AND MAILED OUT ON 02-25-2019.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT THINK TANK LEARNING, INC.
